sections.paragraph:
τηρητής, οῦ, ὁ (since III b.c., incl. pap) sentry, guard in charge of detention AcPl Ha 3, 20.—DELG s.v. τηρέω.

incl. incl. = including

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1003
